title: Transforming, inoculating and isolating purified GeneCopoeia ORF cDNA Clones in E. coli
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6gsa3","text":"purified ORF cDNA plasmids (GeneCopoeia)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ofaj","text":"10 Mm Tris pH 7.4","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ut6e","text":"MAX Efficiency DH5α competent E. coli cells (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #18258012)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":30,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6vdno","text":"SOC Medium (Thermo Fisher Scientific, #15544034)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d0a2o","text":"Miller's LB Broth (Corning, #46-050-CM)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aden8","text":"14 mL falcon tube (Corning, #352059)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9evi3","text":"Carbenicillin, disodium salt (Invitrogen, #10177-012)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dhvj9","text":"QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (Qiagen, #27104)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"djb7b","text":"NanoDrop Eight Spectrophotometer (ThermoFisher)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Purchase purified lyophilized ORF cDNA plasmids from GeneCopoeia.

Reconstitute the lyophilized plasmid stock in 10 mM Tris pH 7.5 to obtain a concentration of 1-10 ng per 5 μl. Store the remaining volume of purified plasmid at 4 °C for short term storage or -80 °C for long term storage.
Take 50 µL MAX Efficiency DH5α competent E. coli cells MAX Efficiency DH5α competent E. coli cells Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #18258012 out of -80 °C and thaw on ice (approximately 20-30 mins).
Add 5 µL of the diluted plasmid from Step 2 to the tube of thawed cells (1 volume of diluted plasmid per 50 μl tube of thawed cells). Carefully flick the tube(s) 4-5 times to mix. Do not vortex.
Place the mixture(s) on ice for 00:30:00
Heat shock the cells by placing them in a 42 °C water bath for 00:00:30
Pipette 500 µL of room temperature SOC medium into each mixture.
Incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 in a shaking incubator 250 rpm, 37 °C, 1 hour
Mix the cells thoroughly by flicking the tube and inverting, then spread 50 µL onto a selection plate (separate plates for each reaction) and incubate overnight at 37 °C .
Add 5 mL of liquid LB per each bacterial culture you will pick from the plate(s) to a 14 mL falcon tube and add 100 µg/mL of carbenicillin.
Using a sterile pipette tip, select single colonies and drop the tips into their own tubes containing the LB + carbenicillin from Step 11 (1 pipette tip per falcon tube).
Place the falcon tube cap(s) back on loosely and incubate at 37 °C for 12-18 hours 18:00:00 in a shaking incubator.
After incubating, check for growth, which is indicated by a cloudy haze in the media.

For long term storage of the bacteria, create a glycerol stock for each tube and store in -80 °C To create a glycerol stock: Prepare glycerol: 1:1 v/v glycerol:ddH2O Pipette 500 µL of glycerol into a cryo vial Pipette 500 µL of overnight inoculation into the vial and pipette up and down to mix Note: My (JI) glycerol stocks are in a box in Vincent van Snow labeled "Glycerol stocks JI" written on pink tape. EX-U0617-M11 - ORF expression clone for TBK1 (NM_013254.3) -N-Flag-TBK1 EX-U0617-M06 - ORF expression clone for TBK1 (NM_013254.3) -N-HA-TBK1 EX-EGFP-M11 - control vector (with EGFP) for pReceiver-M11 -N-Flag-EGFP EX-EGFP-M06 - control vector (with EGFP) for pReceiver-M11 -N-HA-EGFP EX-U0617-M09 - ORF expression clone for TBK1 (NM_013254.4) -C-myc-TBK1 EX-U0617-M35-B - ORF expression clone for TBK1 (NM_013254.3) -C-Flag-TBK1 All of these are stored as glycerol stocks in the -80
Centrifuge the liquid LB Overnight culture at 4 °C at 2800 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes
Purify the plasmid DNA using the QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Qiagen Catalog #27104
Quantify the plasmid DNA using the NanoDrop Eight Spectrophotometer (ThermoFisher). Protocol on Page 17. High quality DNA will have an A 260 /A 280 ratio of 1.7–2.0 (via Sigma ).
creator: Jailyn Izu
